parameters.content:
# Clinera | Tracking Meta CAPI + GA4

**Workflow plug-and-play** para enviar conversiones de Clinera.io
simultaneamente a **Meta Conversions API** y **Google Analytics 4 (Measurement Protocol)**.

---

## 1. Reemplaza los 4 placeholders

Usa Ctrl+F en el workflow y reemplaza:

- `REEMPLAZA_TU_META_PIXEL_ID`        → tu Pixel ID (Events Manager)
- `REEMPLAZA_TU_META_ACCESS_TOKEN`    → token CAPI permanente
- `REEMPLAZA_TU_GA4_MEASUREMENT_ID`   → G-XXXXXXXXXX
- `REEMPLAZA_TU_GA4_API_SECRET`       → Admin > Data Streams > Measurement Protocol API secrets

## 2. (Opcional) Ajusta el evento

En el Code Node "Prepare Tracking Data":

- `EVENT_NAME_META`  default: Lead    (otros: Schedule, Purchase, CompleteRegistration)
- `EVENT_NAME_GA4`   default: generate_lead (snake_case GA4 recommended events)
- `EVENT_VALUE`      default: 0
- `EVENT_CURRENCY`   default: CLP

## 3. Activa el workflow

Toggle "Active" arriba a la derecha. Copia la **Production URL** del Webhook Trigger.

## 4. Conecta con Clinera

En Clinera > Automatizaciones, crea un trigger (ej: "Cambio de etapa de contacto a Lead")
con accion HTTP POST a la URL del webhook. Payload sugerido:

```json
{
  "contacto": { "id": "123", "email": "...", "telefono": "+56...", "nombre": "...", "apellido": "..." },
  "fbp": "...", "fbc": "...",
  "event_id": "...",
  "utm_campaign": "..."
}
```

El workflow acepta payload con o sin wrapper `body`.

## 5. Valida

- **Meta**: Events Manager > Test Events (manda 1 evento real)
- **GA4**:  Configurar > DebugView (anade `debug_mode: true` al payload si quieres)

Docs oficiales:
- Meta CAPI: https://developers.facebook.com/docs/marketing-api/conversions-api
- GA4 MP:    https://developers.google.com/analytics/devguides/collection/protocol/ga4

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status: 'ok', event_name_meta: $('Prepare Tracking Data').first().json.event_name_meta, event_name_ga4: $('Prepare Tracking Data').first().json.event_name_ga4, event_id: $('Prepare Tracking Data').first().json.event_id, meta_status: ($('Send to Meta CAPI').first().json && $('Send to Meta CAPI').first().json.events_received !== undefined) ? 'success' : 'failed', ga4_status: ($('Send to GA4').first().json && $('Send to GA4').first().json.error === undefined) ? 'success' : 'failed'}) }}
